variant.name: Alert
variant.summary: Alert: Stays on screen

variant.name: AppShim
variant.summary: AppShim: Attributed to a PWA

variant.name: Banner
variant.summary: Banner: Auto dismisses

variant.name: ClickedBody.BadClick
variant.summary: User performed a 'bad click' on the body of a notification, which is a click that did not do anything.

variant.name: ClickedBody.GoodClick
variant.summary: User performed a 'good click' on the body of a notification, which is a click that did do some actions.

variant.name: CountOfNotificationShownInFirstMinutePerUser
variant.summary: Count of notifications displayed in the first minute since login for a user

variant.name: NotificationAdded
variant.summary: A notification was created and it was shown

variant.name: Popup.ClickedActionButton
variant.summary: User clicks on an action button of a popup notification

variant.name: Popup.ClickedBody
variant.summary: User clicks the body of a popup notification

variant.name: Popup.ClosedByUser.Click
variant.summary: User closes a popup notification by clicking on the close button

variant.name: Popup.ClosedByUser.Swipe
variant.summary: User closes a popup notification by swiping it away

variant.name: Popup.ExpireToTray
variant.summary: A popup notification times out and is hidden (but still visible in the message center)

variant.name: Popup.Hover
variant.summary: User hover on the body of a popup notification

variant.name: Popup.InlineReplySent
variant.summary: User sends an inline reply in a popup notification

variant.name: Popup.SettingsShown.HoverControls
variant.summary: User opens the settings of a popup notification by clicking on the hover button

variant.name: Popup.Shown
variant.summary: A popup notification is shown

variant.name: Popup.Snoozed.HoverControls
variant.summary: User clicks on the snooze button of a popup notification

variant.name: Tray.ClickedActionButton
variant.summary: User clicks on the action button of a notification in the tray

variant.name: Tray.ClickedBody
variant.summary: User clicks on the body of a notification in the tray

variant.name: Tray.ClosedByClearAll
variant.summary: A tray notification is closed after the user clicks on the Clear All button (note that this is logged for each notification dismissed)

variant.name: Tray.ClosedByUser.Click
variant.summary: User closes a tray notification by clicking on the close button

variant.name: Tray.ClosedByUser.Swipe
variant.summary: User closes a tray notification by swiping it away

variant.name: Tray.Hover
variant.summary: User hover on the body of a notification in the tray

variant.name: Tray.InlineReplySent
variant.summary: User sends an inline reply for a tray notification

variant.name: Tray.SettingsShown.HoverControls
variant.summary: User opens the settings by clicking on the hover button of a tray notification

variant.name: Tray.SettingsShown.SlideControls
variant.summary: User opens the settings by clicking on the slide settings button of a tray notification

variant.name: Tray.Snoozed.HoverControls
variant.summary: User snoozes a notification by clicking on the hover button of a tray notification

variant.name: Tray.Snoozed.SlideControls
variant.summary: User snoozes a notification by clicking on the snooze button of a tray notification

histogram.name: Notifications.Actions
histogram.summary: The actions taken on notifications, recorded every time they happen. This histogram will record every single event that happens separately.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.Build
histogram.summary: Records whether we could successfully build a notification using Android's Notification Builder. If unsuccessful, we will silently drop the notification display request.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.CachedChannelsStatusOnFirstGetRuleIterator
histogram.summary: Recorded when the first GetRuleIterator() is called to retrieve notification channel content settings, whether cached channels are initialized. This is only recorded on non-incognito profile and is only recorded once per browser session.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.JobIsAlreadyPending{IntentAction}
histogram.summary: Recorded before a call to JobScheduler.schedule() in response to a notification intent, and indicates whether there was a job already pending with the same ID.

variant.summary: Counts intents with every action.

variant.name: .PreUnsubscribe
variant.summary: Counts only intents with action PRE_UNSUBSCRIBE.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.JobNativeStartupDuration{IntentAction}
histogram.summary: Records how long native start-up took before dispatching a notification event to the NotificationPlatformBridge. For completeness, a sample is recorded also when native start-up was already partially or fully complete, in which cases significantly shorter durations are expected. Only measured on Android N and above.

variant.summary: Counts intents with every action.

variant.name: .PreUnsubscribe
variant.summary: Counts only intents with action PRE_UNSUBSCRIBE.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.JobPendingReason{IntentAction}
histogram.summary: After a call to JobScheduler.schedule() to handle a notification click, records whether the job ends up pending, and if so, the reason why. Recorded only in Android U and later.

variant.summary: Counts intents with every action.

variant.name: .PreUnsubscribe
variant.summary: Counts only intents with action PRE_UNSUBSCRIBE.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.JobScheduleResult{IntentAction}
histogram.summary: Records wheher JobScheduler.schedule() succeeds when it is called to schedule a job with the JobScheduler to handle a notification click.

variant.summary: Counts intents with every action.

variant.name: .PreUnsubscribe
variant.summary: Counts only intents with action PRE_UNSUBSCRIBE.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.JobStage{IntentAction}
histogram.summary: After a call to JobScheduler.schedule() to handle a notification click, records a sample into a specific bucket whenever the job reaches a specific stage.

variant.summary: Counts intents with every action.

variant.name: .PreUnsubscribe
variant.summary: Counts only intents with action PRE_UNSUBSCRIBE.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.JobStartDelay{IntentAction}
histogram.summary: Records the delay between scheduling a job with the JobScheduler (with a desired latency of 0ms, in response to a notification click) and receiving the onStartJob callback. Only measured on Android N and above.

variant.summary: Counts intents with every action.

variant.name: .PreUnsubscribe
variant.summary: Counts only intents with action PRE_UNSUBSCRIBE.

histogram.name: Notifications.Android.SitesChannel
histogram.summary: Recorded when the Sites channel (which we hope to deprecate) is used as a fallback, when a site-specific notification channel is expected to exist but does not. Note, we only log when the sites channel is *used*, not when it is not used.

histogram.name: Notifications.AppNotificationStatus
histogram.summary: Records whether notifications are enabled for Chrome, as the Android app, for each Web Notification that is being shown to the user.

histogram.name: Notifications.Blocker.ScreenCapture.ClosedCount
histogram.summary:
The number of muted notifications that got closed programmatically (e.g. by the developer via JS) during a screen capture session before they were shown to the user. Logged once after each screen capture session ends.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used. We expect that the number of "0" samples is likely an overestimate because of this. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Blocker.ScreenCapture.MutedCount
histogram.summary:
The number of notifications that got muted during a screen capture session instead of being shown to the user. This number might be higher than the actual number of queued notifications at the end of a session as some notifications might have been closed programmatically before that. Logged once after each screen capture session ends.
This metric was expired between August 2022 and January 2023, and may be missing data until M111.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used. We expect that the number of "0" samples is likely an overestimate because of this. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Blocker.ScreenCapture.ReplacedCount
histogram.summary:
The number of muted notifications that got replaced during a screen capture session. The user will only see the final state of the notification without the previous versions. Logged once after each screen capture session ends.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used. We expect that the number of "0" samples is likely an overestimate because of this. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Blocker.ScreenCapture.RevealDuration
histogram.summary:
Records the time from the start of a screen capture session until the user decided to reveal notification content again. Only logged if and when the user takes that action.
This metric was expired between June 2022 and January 2023, and may be missing data until M111.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used. We expect that the number of "0" samples is likely an overestimate because of this. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Blocker.ScreenCapture.SessionDuration
histogram.summary:
Records the length of a screen capture session. Notifications will be muted initially but the user may reveal them during a session. This metric will be logged after the screen capture session ends.
This metric was expired between December 2022 and January 2023, and may be missing data until M111.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used. We expect that the number of "0" samples is likely an overestimate because of this. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Blocker.ScreenCapture.SnoozedCount
histogram.summary:
The number of snoozed notifications that got prevented from showing up on screen during a screen capture session. This means that the user clicked on the "Snooze" action of a muted notification and continued to receive notifications but we queued them without notifying the user at all. Logged once after each screen capture session ends.
This metric was expired between August 2022 and January 2023, and may be missing data until M111.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used. We expect that the number of "0" samples is likely an overestimate because of this. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Chime.Android.Events
histogram.summary: Various events when Chrome interacts with Chime notification platform. Recorded when Chrome registers to Chime service, receives notifications, and the user interacts with the notification.

histogram.name: Notifications.Chime.Android.Registration
histogram.summary: Records the result of Chime notification platform registration. Each device may have multiple accounts registered. The registration happens right after opening Chrome.

histogram.name: Notifications.Cros.Actions.{NotificationAction}
histogram.summary: Records the notification type when a notification interaction occurs: {NotificationAction}. ChromeOS only.

histogram.name: Notifications.Cros.Actions.{NotificationAction}.GroupedByCatalog
histogram.summary: Records the notification catalog name when a notification interaction occurs: {NotificationAction}. ChromeOS only.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.DeleteAllForOriginsResult
histogram.summary: Records the result status codes of deleting all notification data for given origins. This happens when notification permissions are revoked for a site.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.DeleteBeforeWriteResult
histogram.summary:
Records the result status codes of deleting notification data from the Web Notification database that share their tag (replacement identifier) with a notification that's about to be shown.
This metric was expired between May 2022 and July 2023 and may be missing data.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.DeleteResult
histogram.summary:
Records the result status codes of deleting notification data from the Web Notification database.
This metric was expired between May 2022 and July 2023 and may be missing data.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.DestroyResult
histogram.summary:
Records the result status codes of destroying the Web Notification database altogether.
This metric was expired between May 2022 and July 2023 and may be missing data.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.ExpiredNotificationCount
histogram.summary: Records the number of expired notifications that were stored in the database and therefore got removed and closed on the system. Logged once at startup and every time we synchronize notifications after that (e.g. to schedule the next notification trigger event).

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.OldestNotificationTimeInMinutes
histogram.summary: Records the age of the oldest notification for an origin. Logged after handling a push event for that origin.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.OpenAfterCorruptionResult
histogram.summary:
Records the result status codes of opening the Web Notification database after it has been destroyed in response to data corruption.
This metric was expired between May 2022 and July 2023 and may be missing data.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.OpenResult
histogram.summary:
Records the result status codes of opening the Web Notification database.
This metric may be logged at possibly inappropriate times, such as when system profiles are being used, for which the notification database is usually not required. This issue is tracked in crbug.com/1385455.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.ReadForServiceWorkerResult
histogram.summary:
Records the result status codes of reading data of all notifications associated with a Service Worker from the Web Notification database.
This metric was expired between May 2022 and July 2023 and may be missing data.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.ReadResult
histogram.summary: Records the result status codes of reading data of a single notification from the Web Notification database.

histogram.name: Notifications.Database.WriteResult
histogram.summary: Records the result status codes of writing data for a notification to the Web Notification database.

histogram.name: Notifications.LoadProfileResult
histogram.summary: Records the result of loading the profile when forwarding a notification event. Logged on each notification action (click, close, settings, disable) on platforms that use system notifications (not on Chrome OS or when we're using Chrome's notifications).

histogram.name: Notifications.macOS.AppShimProcess.UptimeOnDisconnect
histogram.summary: The uptime of the notification service in an app shim (PWA) process. Logged when the connection to the service in an app shim process is lost, either on purpose or because the connection was lost unexpectedly.

histogram.name: Notifications.macOS.AppShimProcess.UptimeOnUnexpectedDisconnect
histogram.summary: The uptime of the notification service in an app shim (PWA) process before it got killed unexpectedly (for example crashed). Logged when the connection to the notification service in the app shim process dies, and this wasn't because the user closed the app nor because chrome initiated the disconnect.

histogram.name: Notifications.macOS.ServiceProcessKilled
histogram.summary:
The uptime of the macOS notification service process to display alerts before it got killed unexpectedly. Logged when the service process dies.
This histogram was expired between 2022-08-07 and 2023-09-06. Data might be missing or incomplete for this period.

histogram.name: Notifications.macOS.ServiceProcessRuntime
histogram.summary:
The uptime of the macOS notification service process to display alerts. Logged when we close the connection to the service process either on purpose or after it got killed unexpectedly.
This histogram was expired between 2022-08-14 and 2023-09-06. Data might be missing or incomplete for this period.

histogram.name: Notifications.NonPersistentNotificationThirdPartyCount
histogram.summary: Records the number of non-persistent notifications that are displayed from a third-party context. Logged from BlinkNotificationServiceImpl::DisplayNonPersistentNotification after the notification passes the permissions check.

histogram.name: Notifications.NotificationHelper.ComServerModuleStatus
histogram.summary: The execute status of a ComServerModule class instance. Logged whenever a notification_helper process is launched by Windows. Note: Not logged after M87 until end of August 2022.

histogram.name: Notifications.NotificationHelper.NotificationActivatorPrimaryStatus
histogram.summary: The primary execute status of NotificationActivator::Activate. Logged whenever a notification_helper process is launched by Windows. Note: Not logged after M85 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.NotificationHelper.NotificationActivatorSecondaryStatus
histogram.summary: The secondary execute status of NotificationActivator::Activate. Logged whenever a notification_helper process is launched by Windows. Note: Not logged after M85 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.NotificationHelper.ServerRuntime
histogram.summary: The runtime of the notification_helper server process. This process is created when a notification is activated from the Windows Action Center. Once created, this process does some COM class registration work, so that Windows can call certain APIs to handle the notification activation. Upon finishing the API calls, Windows signals this process to exit. Note: Not logged after M87 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.NotifierType
histogram.summary: The number of times a notification was added for the various types of sources.

histogram.name: Notifications.Permissions.RevokeDeleteCount
histogram.summary: The number of notifications that got deleted from the NotificationDatabase after the notification permissions got revoked.

histogram.name: Notifications.Permissions.UNNotification.{Style}.PermissionRequest
histogram.summary: The permission request result for sending out UNNotifications through the MacNotificationServiceUN. This is recorded when instantiating the service which happens at Chrome startup and each time we start the service after shutting it down when there were no more notifications on screen.

histogram.name: Notifications.Permissions.UNNotification.{Style}.PermissionStatus
histogram.summary: The permission status for sending out UNNotifications through the MacNotificationServiceUN. This is recorded when instantiating the service which happens at Chrome startup and each time we start the service after shutting it down when there were no more notifications on screen.

histogram.name: Notifications.Permissions.UNNotification.{Style}.Style
histogram.summary: The style of notifications being used for sending out UNNotifications through the MacNotificationServiceUN. This is recorded when instantiating the service which happens at Chrome startup and each time we start the service after shutting it down when there were no more notifications on screen.

histogram.name: Notifications.PerNotificationActions
histogram.summary: The actions taken on notifications, recorded once per notification, when it is closed. This differs from the Notifications.Actions histogram in that multiple events of the same type on a single notification will only record a single UMA event.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Actions.Action.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The action label size of one of the notification's actions.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Actions.Icon.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The icon (URL) size of one of the notification's actions.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Actions.Placeholder.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The placeholder size of one of the notification's actions.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Actions.Title.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The title size of one of the notification's actions.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Badge.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's badge (URL).

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Body.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's body.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Data.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's data field.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Icon.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's icon (URL).

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Image.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's image (URL).

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Origin.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's origin.

histogram.name: Notifications.Persistent.Title.SizeInBytes
histogram.summary: The size of the notification's title.

histogram.name: Notifications.PersistentNotificationActionCount
histogram.summary: The number of action buttons the developer provided for a persistent Web Notification. Logged whenever showNotification is called.

histogram.name: Notifications.PersistentNotificationDisplayResult
histogram.summary: The result of the promise returned by showNotification. Logged whenever showNotification is called.

histogram.name: Notifications.PersistentNotificationThirdPartyCount
histogram.summary: Records the number of persistent notifications that are displayed from a third-party context. Logged from BlinkNotificationServiceImpl::DisplayPersistentNotification after the notification passes the permissions check.

histogram.name: Notifications.PersistentWebNotificationClickResult
histogram.summary: Recorded delivery status for persistent notification clicks to a Service Worker when handling a click on a persistent WebNotification has finished.

histogram.name: Notifications.PersistentWebNotificationCloseResult
histogram.summary: Records delivery status for persistent notification close events sent to a Service Worker when the event has been handled.

histogram.name: Notifications.Scheduler.BackgroundTask.NotificationShown
histogram.summary: Records the number of notifications shown in each background task run.

histogram.name: Notifications.Scheduler.NotificationLifeCycleEvent
histogram.summary: Records life cycle events for a scheduled notification, when notification is scheduled, shown or encountering any error.

histogram.name: Notifications.UsingSystemNotificationCenter
histogram.summary: Indicates if Chrome is using system notifications or the Chrome notification center. Logged on each start up.

histogram.name: Notifications.WebPlatformV2.{Action}.TimeToActivity
histogram.summary: Records the delay between the user clicking on the {Action} of a web platform notification, and an Activity being launched. Only records if the duration is less than 10 seconds.

variant.name: ActionButton
variant.summary: action button

histogram.name: Notifications.WebPlatformV2.{Action}.TimeToClose
histogram.summary: Records the delay between the user clicking on the {Action} of a web platform notification, and the notification being closed. Only records if the duration is less than 10 seconds.

variant.name: ActionButton
variant.summary: action button

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.ActivationStatus
histogram.summary: The status of Activation requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever an activation from a notification occurs. Note: Not logged from January 2021 to end of August 2022.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.CloseStatus
histogram.summary: The status of Close requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a notification is closed. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023 and Sept 2024.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.CreateToastManagerErrorCode
histogram.summary: The HRESULT returned by the Windows Action Center, when trying to create a toast manager fails. This provides a more detailed error in the cases the histogram Notifications.Windows.DisplayStatus reported CREATE_TOAST_NOTIFIER_WITH_ID_FAILED. Note: Not logged after M89 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023 and Sept 2024.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.DisplayFailure
histogram.summary: The HRESULT returned by the Windows Action Center, when showing a notification fails. Note: Not logged at the beginning of Sept 2023

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.DisplayStatus
histogram.summary: The status of Display requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a notification is displayed. For a more detailed error about CREATE_TOAST_NOTIFIER_WITH_ID_FAILED and SHOWING_TOAST_FAILED, see Notification.Windows histograms CreateToastManagerErrorCode and ShowFailedErrorCode (respectively). Note: Not logged between January 2022 until end of August 2022.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetDisplayedLaunchIdStatus
histogram.summary: The status of decoding launch ids while processing a GetDisplayed requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a request to retrieve all displayed notifications comes in. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetDisplayedStatus
histogram.summary: The status of GetDisplayedStatus requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a request to retrieve all displayed notifications comes in. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetNotificationLaunchIdStatus
histogram.summary: The status of GetNotificationLaunchId requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a request to decode the GetNotificationLaunchId comes in. Note: Not logged between January 2022 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetSettingPolicy
histogram.summary: The policy value provided by get_Setting in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a request to show a notification comes in. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetSettingPolicyStartup
histogram.summary: The policy value provided by get_Setting in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged only once at startup on a task runner. Note: Not logged at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetSettingStatus
histogram.summary: The return value of get_Setting calls in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a request to show a notification comes in. Note: Not logged at the beginning of Sept 2023

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.GetSettingStatusStartup
histogram.summary: The return value of get_Setting calls in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged only once at startup on a task runner. Note: Not logged at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.HandleEventStatus
histogram.summary: The status of HandleEvent requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a notification event is being handled. Note: Not logged between January 2022 and end of August 2022, and not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.HistoryStatus
histogram.summary: The status of History requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever history is requested for notifications. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.LaunchIdDecodeStatus
histogram.summary: Used to indicate the status of decoding an input launch id string (Windows only). Logged whenever a notification event is being handled. Note: Not logged after M87 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.OnFailedStatus
histogram.summary: The status of OnFailed requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged whenever a failed event is handled. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.SetReadyCallbackStatus2
histogram.summary: The status of SetReadyCallback requests in NotificationPlatformBridgeWin (Windows only). Logged once at startup. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.ShowFailedErrorCode
histogram.summary: The HRESULT returned by the Windows Action Center, when trying to create a toast manager fails. This provides a more detailed error in the cases the histogram Notifications.Windows.DisplayStatus reported SHOWING_TOAST_FAILED. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and not at the beginning of Sept 2023.

histogram.name: Notifications.Windows.StartMenuShortcutStatus
histogram.summary: Used to indicate the status of start menu shortcut (Windows only). Logged whenever a notification display attempt is made. Note: Not logged after M98 until end of August 2022, and also not at the beginning of Sept 2023.
